<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Repository\SeasonRepository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Season;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest\ApiHelper;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\MockObject;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;
use Psr\Log\NullLogger;

class ApiHelperTest extends TestCase
{
    /**
     * @var ConfigManager|MockObject
     */
    private $configManager;

    /**
     * @var EntityManagerInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $em;

    private ApiHelper $apiHelper;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->configManager = $this->createMock(ConfigManager::class);
        $this->em            = $this->createMock(EntityManagerInterface::class);

        $this->apiHelper = new ApiHelper($this->configManager, $this->em, new NullLogger());
    }

    public function testExtractAvailableDatesReturnsDistinctStartDates(): void
    {
        $timeslots = [
            ['uuid' => 's1', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 2],
            ['uuid' => 's2', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 600, 'endTime' => 660, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 0],
            ['uuid' => 's3', 'startDate' => '2026-04-11', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 5],
        ];

        $this->assertSame(['2026-04-10', '2026-04-11'], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates($timeslots));
    }

    public function testExtractAvailableDatesOnEmptyPayload(): void
    {
        $this->assertSame([], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates([]));
    }

    public function testHydrateSubContingentFromTimeslotMapsFieldsAndMarksProvider(): void
    {
        $webinstance = new WebInstance();
        $subContingent = new SubContingent();

        $timeslot = [
            'uuid'          => 'slot-uuid-1',
            'startDate'     => '2026-04-15',
            'startTime'     => 540, // 09:00
            'endTime'       => 600, // 10:00
            'capacity'      => 20,
            'occupiedSlots' => 3,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot($subContingent, $timeslot, $webinstance);

        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result);
        $this->assertSame('slot-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(17, $result->getQuotaAvailable());
        $this->assertSame(3, $result->getQuotaInUse());
        $this->assertFalse($result->getDailyBooking());
        $this->assertSame($webinstance, $result->getWebinstance());
        $this->assertSame('2026-04-15 09:00:00', $result->getDate()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseSetsExternalIdAndInitStatus(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $subContingent   = new SubContingent();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-1',
            'isCanceled' => false,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, $subContingent);

        $this->assertSame($externalBooking, $result);
        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::INIT, $result->getStatus());
        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result->getSubContingent());
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseMarksCancelled(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-2',
            'isCanceled' => true,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, null);

        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-2', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::CANCELLED, $result->getStatus());
    }

    public function testBuildCreateBookingPayloadUsesOrderDataAndFallsBackToDefaults(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');
        $order->setEmail('customer@example.com');
        $order->setDatacustom(['firstname' => 'Jane', 'lastname' => 'Doe', 'mobile' => '+33612345678']);

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(2);

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildCreateBookingPayload($order, $subContingentData, $externalBooking);

        $this->assertTrue($payload['isItPreBooking']);
        $this->assertSame('Jane Doe', $payload['customerName']);
        $this->assertSame('customer@example.com', $payload['customerEmail']);
        $this->assertSame('+33612345678', $payload['customerPhoneNumber']);

        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('pricePaid', $payload['bookingDetail']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('orderDate', $payload['bookingDetail']);
    }

    public function testBuildConfirmBookingPayloadEmitsBookingDetail(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $subContingent->setExternalId('slot-1');

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');
        $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(1);

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildConfirmBookingPayload($order, $externalBooking, $subContingentData);

        $this->assertArrayHasKey('bookingDetail', $payload);
        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
    }

    public function testGetAvailabilityDateRangeReadsCurrentSeason(): void
    {
        $season = new Season();
        $season
            ->setStartDate(new \DateTime('2026-04-01'))
            ->setEndDate(new \DateTime('2026-10-31'));

        $seasonRepo = $this->createMock(SeasonRepository::class);
        $seasonRepo->method('getCurrentSeason')->willReturn($season);

        $this->em
            ->method('getRepository')
            ->with(Season::class)
            ->willReturn($seasonRepo);

        $range = $this->apiHelper->getAvailabilityDateRange();

        $this->assertSame('2026-04-01', $range['from']);
        $this->assertSame('2026-10-31', $range['to']);
    }
}

    {
        $timeslots = [
            ['uuid' => 's1', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 2],
            ['uuid' => 's2', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 600, 'endTime' => 660, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 0],
            ['uuid' => 's3', 'startDate' => '2026-04-11', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 5],
        ];

        $this->assertSame(['2026-04-10', '2026-04-11'], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates($timeslots));
    }

    public function testExtractAvailableDatesOnEmptyPayload(): void
    {
        $this->assertSame([], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates([]));
    }

    public function testHydrateSubContingentFromTimeslotMapsFieldsAndMarksProvider(): void
    {
        $webinstance = new WebInstance();
        $subContingent = new SubContingent();

        $timeslot = [
            'uuid'          => 'slot-uuid-1',
            'startDate'     => '2026-04-15',
            'startTime'     => 540, // 09:00
            'endTime'       => 600, // 10:00
            'capacity'      => 20,
            'occupiedSlots' => 3,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot($subContingent, $timeslot, $webinstance);

        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result);
        $this->assertSame('slot-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(17, $result->getQuotaAvailable());
        $this->assertSame(3, $result->getQuotaInUse());
        $this->assertFalse($result->isDailyBooking());
        $this->assertSame($webinstance, $result->getWebinstance());
        $this->assertSame('2026-04-15 09:00:00', $result->getDate()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseSetsExternalIdAndInitStatus(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $subContingent   = new SubContingent();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-1',
            'isCanceled' => false,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, $subContingent);

        $this->assertSame($externalBooking, $result);
        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::INIT, $result->getStatus());
        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result->getSubContingent());
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseMarksCancelled(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-2',
            'isCanceled' => true,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, null);

        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-2', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::CANCELLED, $result->getStatus());
    }

    public function testBuildCreateBookingPayloadUsesOrderDataAndFallsBackToDefaults(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');
        $order->setEmail('customer@example.com');
        $order->setDatacustom(['firstname' => 'Jane', 'lastname' => 'Doe']);

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(2);

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildCreateBookingPayload($order, $subContingentData, $externalBooking);

        $this->assertTrue($payload['isItPreBooking']);
        $this->assertSame('Jane Doe', $payload['customerName']);
        $this->assertSame('customer@example.com', $payload['customerEmail']);
        $this->assertSame('+33612345678', $payload['customerPhoneNumber']);

        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('pricePaid', $payload['bookingDetail']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('orderDate', $payload['bookingDetail']);
    }

    public function testBuildConfirmBookingPayloadEmitsBookingDetail(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $subContingent->setExternalId('slot-1');

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');
        $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(1);

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildConfirmBookingPayload($order, $externalBooking, $subContingentData);

        $this->assertArrayHasKey('bookingDetail', $payload);
        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
    }

    public function testGetAvailabilityDateRangeReadsCurrentSeason(): void
    {
        $season = new Season();
        $season
            ->setStartDate(new \DateTime('2026-04-01'))
            ->setEndDate(new \DateTime('2026-10-31'));

        $seasonRepo = $this->createMock(SeasonRepository::class);
        $seasonRepo->method('getCurrentSeason')->willReturn($season);

        $this->em
            ->method('getRepository')
            ->with(Season::class)
            ->willReturn($seasonRepo);

        $range = $this->apiHelper->getAvailabilityDateRange();

        $this->assertSame('2026-04-01', $range['from']);
        $this->assertSame('2026-10-31', $range['to']);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Orderitem;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\TicketOrderitem;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Exception\ExternalActivityException;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\OrderitemInterface;

interface ExternalActivityHandlerInterface
{
    /**
     * Get days availability.
     *
     * @param Product $product
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getDaysAvailability(Product $product): array;

    /**
     * Get SubContigent between dates.
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function getSubContingentsBetweenDates(Product $product, \DateTime $startDate, ?\DateTime $endDate): array;

    /**
     * Get SubContinget by subContingentId.
     *
     * @param Product   $product
     * @param \DateTime $startDate
     * @param string    $subContingentId
     * @param bool      $withCache
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return SubContingent
     */
    public function getSubContingent(Product $product, \DateTime $startDate, string $subContingentId, ?bool $withCache = false): ?SubContingent;

    /**
     * Create booking on exteran system.
     *
     * @param Order             $order
     * @param SubContingentData $subContingentData
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking
     */
    public function createBooking(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData): ExternalBooking;

    /**
     * Synchronise data with external system.
     *
     * @param Order           $order
     * @param ExternalBooking $externalBooking
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking|null
     */
    public function synchronizeBooking(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ExternalBooking;

    /**
     * Confirm booking with external system.
     *
     * @param Order           $order
     * @param ExternalBooking $externalBooking
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking|null
     */
    public function confirmBooking(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ExternalBooking;

    /**
     * Get Booking on Database first and then by partner system.
     *
     * @param string                         $externalBookingId
     * @param WebInstance                    $webInstance
     * @param Orderitem|TicketOrderitem|null $item
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking|null
     */
    public function findBooking(string $externalBookingId, WebInstance $webInstance, ?OrderitemInterface $item = null): ?ExternalBooking;
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBooking\Rest;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Orderitem;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\TicketOrderitem;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Exception\ExternalActivityException;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ExternalActivityHandlerInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\OrderitemInterface;
use GuzzleHttp\Exception\RequestException;
use Psr\SimpleCache\CacheInterface;

class ElibertyBookingHandler implements ExternalActivityHandlerInterface
{
    private const BOOKING_UNIT_LIFETIME = 120;

    private ClientFactory $restFactory;

    private CacheInterface $redisCache;

    private ApiHelper $apiHelper;

    private EntityManagerInterface $em;

    public function __construct(
        ClientFactory $factory,
        ApiHelper $apiHelper,
        CacheInterface $redisCache,
        EntityManagerInterface $em
    ) {
        $this->restFactory = $factory;
        $this->apiHelper   = $apiHelper;
        $this->redisCache  = $redisCache;
        $this->em          = $em;
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function getDaysAvailability(Product $product): array
    {
        try {
            $resourceId = $product->getExternalActivityResourceId();
            $path       = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/resources/%s/availabilityunits', $resourceId);
            $client     = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $params     = $this->apiHelper->getParamDaysAvailability();
            $cacheKey   = $this->apiHelper->getRedisKey('booking_days', $path, $params);

            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('getDaysAvailability for booking with params', $params);

            if (!$days = $this->redisCache->get($cacheKey)) {
                $res = $client->get($path, ['query' => $params]);

                $response = json_decode($res->getBody(), true);
                $days     = $this->apiHelper->getListOfDays($response);

                if ($this->apiHelper->getCacheExpirationTime() > 0) {
                    $this->redisCache->set($cacheKey, $days, $this->apiHelper->getCacheExpirationTime());
                }
            }

            return $days;
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($requestException);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function getSubContingentsBetweenDates(Product $product, \DateTime $startDate, ?\DateTime $endDate): array
    {
        try {
            $resourceId = $product->getExternalActivityResourceId();
            $path       = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/resources/%s/units', $resourceId);
            $client     = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $params     = $this->apiHelper->getParamActivitiesBetweenDates($startDate, $endDate);

            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('getSubContingentsBetweenDates for booking with params', $params);

            $res        = $client->get($path, ['query' => $params]);
            $response   = json_decode($res->getBody(), true);
            $activities = $this->apiHelper->getSubContingents($response);

            foreach ($activities as $activity) {
                $this->em->persist($activity);
            }

            $this->em->flush();

            return $activities->toArray();
        } catch (RequestException $e) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($e);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function getSubContingent(Product $product, \DateTime $startDate, string $subContingentId, ?bool $withCache = true): ?SubContingent
    {
        try {
            $path           = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/units/%s', $subContingentId);
            $client         = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $cacheKey       = $this->apiHelper->getRedisKey('booking_unit_', $path, []);
            $fromRedisCache = true;

            if (false === $withCache || !$subContingent = $this->redisCache->get($cacheKey)) {
                $this->apiHelper->logInfo('getSubContingent for booking with params', ['unit' => $subContingentId]);
                $subContingent = json_decode($client->get($path)->getBody(), true);
                $subContingent = $this->apiHelper->serializeSubContingentResponse($subContingent);
                $this->redisCache->set($cacheKey, $subContingent, self::BOOKING_UNIT_LIFETIME);
                $fromRedisCache = false;
            }

            if (!$fromRedisCache) {
                $this->em->persist($subContingent);
                $this->em->flush();
            }

            return $subContingent;
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($requestException);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function createBooking(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData): ExternalBooking
    {
        try {
            // if we have an externalBookingId update data in partner system
            if (null !== $subContingentData->getExternalBookingId()) {
                return $this->updateBooking($order, $subContingentData);
            }

            $client  = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $locale  = $order->getLocale() ?? 'fr';
            $path    = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/orders?mode=clean_old_externalref&hl=%s', $locale);
            $payload = $this->apiHelper->getParamCreateBooking($order, $subContingentData);

            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('createBooking for booking with params', $payload);

            $response = json_decode($client->post($path, ['json' => $payload])->getBody(), true);

            $criterias = [
                'externalId'  => $subContingentData->getSubContingentId(),
                'webinstance' => $order->getWebinstance(),
            ];

            $subContingent = $this->em->getRepository(SubContingent::class)->findOneBy($criterias);

            return $this->apiHelper->serializeExternalBookingResponse($response, $subContingent);
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    private function updateBooking(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData): ExternalBooking
    {
        $criterias = [
            'externalId'  => $subContingentData->getExternalBookingId(),
            'webinstance' => $order->getWebinstance(),
        ];

        /** @var ExternalBooking $externalBooking */
        $externalBooking = $this->em->getRepository(ExternalBooking::class)->findOneBy($criterias);
        $externalBooking->setCount($subContingentData->getQty()); // seems that count/qty is not consistent with the real number of items...

        return $this->synchronizeBooking($order, $externalBooking);
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function synchronizeBooking(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ExternalBooking
    {
        try {
            $client  = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $path    = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/orders/%s', $externalBooking->getExternalId());
            $payload = $this->apiHelper->getParamSynchronizeBooking($order, $externalBooking);
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo(\sprintf('synchronizeBooking with params for orders %s', $order->getId()), $payload);
            $body = $client->put($path, ['json' => $payload])->getBody();
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo(\sprintf('synchronizeBooking response : %s', $body), []);

            $response        = json_decode($body, true);
            $externalBooking = $this->apiHelper->serializeExternalBookingResponse(
                $response,
                $externalBooking->getSubContingent(),
                $externalBooking
            );
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo(\sprintf('synchronizeBooking externalBooking reference : %s', $externalBooking->getExternalReference()), []);

            return $externalBooking;
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param Order           $order
     * @param ExternalBooking $externalBooking
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function confirmBooking(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ExternalBooking
    {
        try {
            $client  = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $path    = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/orders/%s', $externalBooking->getExternalId());
            $payload = $this->apiHelper->getParamConfirmBooking($order);

            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('confirmBooking for booking with params', $payload);

            $response = json_decode($client->put($path, ['json' => $payload])->getBody(), true);

            return $this->apiHelper->serializeExternalBookingResponse(
                $response,
                $externalBooking->getSubContingent(),
                $externalBooking
            );
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param string $externalBookingId
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    private function getExternalBooking(string $externalBookingId): ExternalBooking
    {
        try {
            $client = $this->restFactory->getClient();
            $path   = sprintf('/api/rest/v1/orders/%s', $externalBookingId);

            $response = json_decode($client->get($path)->getBody(), true);

            $externalBooking = $this->apiHelper->serializeExternalBookingResponse(
                $response,
            );

            $this->em->persist($externalBooking);

            return $externalBooking;
        } catch (RequestException $requestException) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogRequestException(__METHOD__, $requestException);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $error = $this->apiHelper->parseAndLogException(__METHOD__, $e);

            throw new ExternalActivityException($error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param Orderitem|TicketOrderitem|null $item
     *
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function findBooking(string $externalBookingId, WebInstance $webInstance, ?OrderitemInterface $item = null): ?ExternalBooking
    {
        $criterias = [
            'externalId'  => $externalBookingId,
            'webinstance' => $webInstance,
        ];

        $externalBooking = $this->em->getRepository(ExternalBooking::class)->findOneBy($criterias);

        if (null === $externalBooking) {
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('no booking found for this externalBookingId in redpill database.', $criterias);
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('Call booking application to check if this order exist', ['booking_id' => $externalBookingId]);

            $externalBooking = $this->getExternalBooking($externalBookingId);

            $this->em->flush();
        }

        if (null === $externalBooking) {
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('no booking found for this externalBookingId', ['booking_id' => $externalBookingId]);
            $this->apiHelper->logInfo('unable to find booking with this id');
        }

        return $externalBooking;
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityRepository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository\BookingV2Repository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Exception\ExternalActivityException;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest\ApiHelper;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest\ElibertyBookingV2Handler;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\MockObject;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;
use Psr\SimpleCache\CacheInterface;

class ElibertyBookingV2HandlerTest extends TestCase
{
    /**
     * @var BookingV2Repository|MockObject
     */
    private $repository;

    /**
     * @var ApiHelper|MockObject
     */
    private $apiHelper;

    /**
     * @var CacheInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $redisCache;

    /**
     * @var EntityManagerInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $em;

    private ElibertyBookingV2Handler $handler;

    private Product $product;
    private WebInstance $webinstance;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->repository = $this->createMock(BookingV2Repository::class);
        $this->apiHelper  = $this->createMock(ApiHelper::class);
        $this->redisCache = $this->createMock(CacheInterface::class);
        $this->em         = $this->createMock(EntityManagerInterface::class);

        $this->handler = new ElibertyBookingV2Handler(
            $this->repository,
            $this->apiHelper,
            $this->redisCache,
            $this->em
        );

        $this->webinstance = new WebInstance();
        $this->product     = new Product();
        $this->product->setExternalActivityData(['resource_id' => 'resource-uuid', 'provider' => ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2]);
    }

    public function testGetDaysAvailabilityReturnsCachedValueWhenPresent(): void
    {
        $this->apiHelper->method('getAvailabilityDateRange')->willReturn(['from' => '2026-04-01', 'to' => '2026-10-31']);
        $this->apiHelper->method('getRedisKey')->willReturn('cache-key');

        $this->redisCache->method('get')->with('cache-key')->willReturn(['2026-04-10', '2026-04-11']);

        $this->repository->expects($this->never())->method('listTimeslots');

        $this->assertSame(['2026-04-10', '2026-04-11'], $this->handler->getDaysAvailability($this->product));
    }

    public function testGetDaysAvailabilityFetchesFromRepositoryAndCachesOnMiss(): void
    {
        $this->apiHelper->method('getAvailabilityDateRange')->willReturn(['from' => '2026-04-01', 'to' => '2026-10-31']);
        $this->apiHelper->method('getRedisKey')->willReturn('cache-key');
        $this->apiHelper->method('getCacheExpirationTime')->willReturn(300);

        $this->redisCache->method('get')->willReturn(null);

        $timeslots = [['uuid' => 's1', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10']];
        $this->repository
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('listTimeslots')
            ->with('resource-uuid', '2026-04-01', '2026-10-31')
            ->willReturn(['items' => $timeslots]);

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('extractAvailableDates')
            ->with($timeslots)
            ->willReturn(['2026-04-10']);

        $this->redisCache
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('set')
            ->with('cache-key', ['2026-04-10'], 300);

        $this->assertSame(['2026-04-10'], $this->handler->getDaysAvailability($this->product));
    }

    public function testGetDaysAvailabilityWrapsExceptionsAsExternalActivityException(): void
    {
        $this->apiHelper->method('getAvailabilityDateRange')->willReturn(['from' => '2026-04-01', 'to' => '2026-10-31']);
        $this->apiHelper->method('getRedisKey')->willReturn('cache-key');

        $this->redisCache->method('get')->willReturn(null);
        $this->repository->method('listTimeslots')->willThrowException(new \RuntimeException('boom'));

        $this->expectException(ExternalActivityException::class);
        $this->handler->getDaysAvailability($this->product);
    }

    public function testGetSubContingentsBetweenDatesHydratesAndPersistsEachTimeslot(): void
    {
        $webinstanceRepo = $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class);
        $webinstanceRepo->method('__call')->with('getWebinstance')->willReturn($this->webinstance);
        $this->em->method('getRepository')->willReturnMap([
            [WebInstance::class, $webinstanceRepo],
            [SubContingent::class, $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class)],
        ]);

        $timeslots = [
            ['uuid' => 'slot-a', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10'],
            ['uuid' => 'slot-b', 'startDate' => '2026-04-11'],
        ];

        $this->repository
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('listTimeslots')
            ->with('resource-uuid', '2026-04-10', '2026-04-11')
            ->willReturn(['items' => $timeslots]);

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->exactly(2))
            ->method('hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot')
            ->willReturnCallback(function (SubContingent $sc, array $timeslot, WebInstance $wi): SubContingent {
                $sc->setExternalId($timeslot['uuid']);

                return $sc;
            });

        $this->em->expects($this->exactly(2))->method('persist');
        $this->em->expects($this->once())->method('flush');

        $result = $this->handler->getSubContingentsBetweenDates(
            $this->product,
            new \DateTime('2026-04-10'),
            new \DateTime('2026-04-11')
        );

        $this->assertCount(2, $result);
        $this->assertInstanceOf(SubContingent::class, $result[0]);
    }

    public function testGetSubContingentReturnsFromDatabaseWhenFound(): void
    {
        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $subContingent->setExternalId('slot-1');

        $repo = $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class);
        $repo->method('findOneBy')->willReturn($subContingent);

        $webinstanceRepo = $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class);
        $webinstanceRepo->method('__call')->with('getWebinstance')->willReturn($this->webinstance);

        $this->em->method('getRepository')->willReturnMap([
            [SubContingent::class, $repo],
            [WebInstance::class, $webinstanceRepo],
        ]);

        $this->repository->expects($this->never())->method('listTimeslots');

        $result = $this->handler->getSubContingent(
            $this->product,
            new \DateTime('2026-04-10'),
            'slot-1',
            true
        );

        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result);
    }

    public function testCreateBookingCallsRepositoryAndHydratesResponse(): void
    {
        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $subContingent->setExternalId('slot-1');

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setSubContingentId('slot-1');
        $subContingentData->setProduct($this->product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(1);

        $order = new Order();
        $order->setWebinstance($this->webinstance);

        $payload  = ['isItPreBooking' => true];
        $response = ['uuid' => 'booking-1', 'isCanceled' => false];

        $subContingentRepo = $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class);
        $subContingentRepo->method('findOneBy')->willReturn($subContingent);
        $this->em->method('getRepository')->willReturnMap([
            [SubContingent::class, $subContingentRepo],
        ]);

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('buildCreateBookingPayload')
            ->willReturn($payload);

        $this->repository
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('createBooking')
            ->with('slot-1', $payload)
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse')
            ->willReturnCallback(function (ExternalBooking $eb, array $resp, ?SubContingent $sc): ExternalBooking {
                $eb->setExternalId($resp['uuid']);
                $eb->setStatus(ExternalBookingState::INIT);
                $eb->setSubContingent($sc);

                return $eb;
            });

        $this->em->expects($this->once())->method('persist');
        $this->em->expects($this->once())->method('flush');

        $result = $this->handler->createBooking($order, $subContingentData);

        $this->assertSame('booking-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::INIT, $result->getStatus());
        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result->getSubContingent());
    }

    public function testSynchronizeBookingCallsExtendPrebookAndReturnsSameBooking(): void
    {
        $order           = new Order();
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');
        $externalBooking->setStatus(ExternalBookingState::INIT);

        $this->repository
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('extendPrebook')
            ->with('booking-1')
            ->willReturn(['uuid' => 'booking-1']);

        $result = $this->handler->synchronizeBooking($order, $externalBooking);

        $this->assertSame($externalBooking, $result);
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::INIT, $result->getStatus());
    }

    public function testConfirmBookingCallsConfirmPrebookAndSetsConfirmedStatus(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();

        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');
        $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);

        $payload  = ['bookingDetail' => ['productName' => 'x']];
        $response = ['uuid' => 'booking-1', 'isCanceled' => false];

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('buildConfirmBookingPayload')
            ->willReturn($payload);

        $this->repository
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('confirmPrebook')
            ->with('booking-1', $payload)
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->apiHelper
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse')
            ->willReturnArgument(0);

        $result = $this->handler->confirmBooking($order, $externalBooking);

        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::CONFIRMED, $result->getStatus());
    }

    public function testFindBookingReturnsFromDatabase(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');

        $repo = $this->createMock(EntityRepository::class);
        $repo->expects($this->once())
            ->method('findOneBy')
            ->with([
                'externalId'  => 'booking-1',
                'webinstance' => $this->webinstance,
            ])
            ->willReturn($externalBooking);

        $this->em->method('getRepository')
            ->with(ExternalBooking::class)
            ->willReturn($repo);

        $result = $this->handler->findBooking('booking-1', $this->webinstance);

        $this->assertSame($externalBooking, $result);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Season;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Helpers\BaseApiHelper;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\Order;

/**
 * Pure mapping helper for the Eliberty Booking V2 REST provider.
 * Builds request payloads and hydrates domain entities from API responses.
 * Performs no I/O besides Doctrine lookups needed to resolve the current season.
 */
class ApiHelper extends BaseApiHelper
{
    public const CURRENCY_EUR = 'EUR';
    public const ORIGIN_ESHOP = 'ESHOP';

    /**
     * @param array<int, array<string, mixed>> $timeslots
     *
     * @return array<int, string>
     */
    public function extractAvailableDates(array $timeslots): array
    {
        $dates = [];
        foreach ($timeslots as $timeslot) {
            $startDate = $timeslot['startDate'] ?? null;
            if (null === $startDate) {
                continue;
            }
            $day = substr((string) $startDate, 0, 10);
            if (!\in_array($day, $dates, true)) {
                $dates[] = $day;
            }
        }

        return $dates;
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $timeslot
     */
    public function hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot(SubContingent $subContingent, array $timeslot, WebInstance $webinstance): SubContingent
    {
        $capacity      = (int) ($timeslot['capacity'] ?? 0);
        $occupiedSlots = (int) ($timeslot['occupiedSlots'] ?? 0);
        $startTime     = (int) ($timeslot['startTime'] ?? 0);

        $day = substr((string) ($timeslot['startDate'] ?? ''), 0, 10);
        $date = new \DateTime($day);
        $date->modify(sprintf('+%d minutes', $startTime));

        $subContingent
            ->setExternalId((string) ($timeslot['uuid'] ?? ''))
            ->setLabel((string) ($timeslot['uuid'] ?? ''))
            ->setType(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2)
            ->setQuotaAvailable(max(0, $capacity - $occupiedSlots))
            ->setQuotaInUse($occupiedSlots)
            ->setDailyBooking(false)
            ->setDate($date)
            ->setWebinstance($webinstance);

        return $subContingent;
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $response
     */
    public function hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse(ExternalBooking $externalBooking, array $response, ?SubContingent $subContingent): ExternalBooking
    {
        $isCanceled = (bool) ($response['isCanceled'] ?? false);

        $externalBooking
            ->setExternalId((string) ($response['uuid'] ?? $externalBooking->getExternalId()))
            ->setType(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2)
            ->setStatus($isCanceled ? ExternalBookingState::CANCELLED : ExternalBookingState::INIT);

        if (null !== $subContingent) {
            $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);
        }

        return $externalBooking;
    }

    /**
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function buildCreateBookingPayload(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): array
    {
        $firstname = (string) $this->getBookerName('firstname', $order, $externalBooking);
        $lastname  = (string) $this->getBookerName('lastname', $order, $externalBooking);

        return [
            'isItPreBooking'      => true,
            'customerUserId'      => (string) $order->getId(),
            'customerName'        => trim($firstname.' '.$lastname),
            'customerEmail'       => (string) ($order->getEmail() ?? (ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME.'@local')),
            'customerPhoneNumber' => (string) ($this->getBookerPhone($order, $externalBooking) ?? ''),
            'bookingDetail'       => $this->buildBookingDetail($order, $subContingentData),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function buildConfirmBookingPayload(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking, SubContingentData $subContingentData): array
    {
        return [
            'bookingDetail' => $this->buildBookingDetail($order, $subContingentData),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * @return array{from: string, to: string}
     */
    public function getAvailabilityDateRange(): array
    {
        /** @var Season|null $season */
        $season = $this->em->getRepository(Season::class)->getCurrentSeason();

        if (null === $season) {
            $today = new \DateTime('today');

            return [
                'from' => $today->format('Y-m-d'),
                'to'   => $today->format('Y-m-d'),
            ];
        }

        return [
            'from' => $season->getStartDate()->format('Y-m-d'),
            'to'   => $season->getEndDate()->format('Y-m-d'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    private function buildBookingDetail(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData): array
    {
        $product    = $subContingentData->getProduct();
        $productId  = (string) ($product->getCode() ?? (string) $product->getId());
        $pricePaid  = (int) round(((float) $order->getTotal()) * 100);
        $orderDate  = (new \DateTime('today'))->format('Y-m-d');

        return [
            'productName' => (string) $product->getName(),
            'productId'   => $productId,
            'pricePaid'   => $pricePaid,
            'currency'    => self::CURRENCY_EUR,
            'orderDate'   => $orderDate,
            'origin'      => self::ORIGIN_ESHOP,
        ];
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Repository\SeasonRepository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Season;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest\ApiHelper;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\MockObject;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;
use Psr\Log\NullLogger;

class ApiHelperTest extends TestCase
{
    /**
     * @var ConfigManager|MockObject
     */
    private $configManager;

    /**
     * @var EntityManagerInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $em;

    private ApiHelper $apiHelper;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->configManager = $this->createMock(ConfigManager::class);
        $this->em            = $this->createMock(EntityManagerInterface::class);

        $this->apiHelper = new ApiHelper($this->configManager, $this->em, new NullLogger());
    }

    public function testExtractAvailableDatesReturnsDistinctStartDates(): void
    {
        $timeslots = [
            ['uuid' => 's1', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 2],
            ['uuid' => 's2', 'startDate' => '2026-04-10', 'startTime' => 600, 'endTime' => 660, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 0],
            ['uuid' => 's3', 'startDate' => '2026-04-11', 'startTime' => 540, 'endTime' => 600, 'capacity' => 10, 'occupiedSlots' => 5],
        ];

        $this->assertSame(['2026-04-10', '2026-04-11'], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates($timeslots));
    }

    public function testExtractAvailableDatesOnEmptyPayload(): void
    {
        $this->assertSame([], $this->apiHelper->extractAvailableDates([]));
    }

    public function testHydrateSubContingentFromTimeslotMapsFieldsAndMarksProvider(): void
    {
        $webinstance = new WebInstance();
        $subContingent = new SubContingent();

        $timeslot = [
            'uuid'          => 'slot-uuid-1',
            'startDate'     => '2026-04-15',
            'startTime'     => 540, // 09:00
            'endTime'       => 600, // 10:00
            'capacity'      => 20,
            'occupiedSlots' => 3,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot($subContingent, $timeslot, $webinstance);

        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result);
        $this->assertSame('slot-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(17, $result->getQuotaAvailable());
        $this->assertSame(3, $result->getQuotaInUse());
        $this->assertFalse($result->isDailyBooking());
        $this->assertSame($webinstance, $result->getWebinstance());
        $this->assertSame('2026-04-15 09:00:00', $result->getDate()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseSetsExternalIdAndInitStatus(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $subContingent   = new SubContingent();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-1',
            'isCanceled' => false,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, $subContingent);

        $this->assertSame($externalBooking, $result);
        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-1', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2, $result->getType());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::INIT, $result->getStatus());
        $this->assertSame($subContingent, $result->getSubContingent());
    }

    public function testHydrateExternalBookingFromResponseMarksCancelled(): void
    {
        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $response = [
            'uuid'       => 'booking-uuid-2',
            'isCanceled' => true,
        ];

        $result = $this->apiHelper->hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse($externalBooking, $response, null);

        $this->assertSame('booking-uuid-2', $result->getExternalId());
        $this->assertSame(ExternalBookingState::CANCELLED, $result->getStatus());
    }

    public function testBuildCreateBookingPayloadUsesOrderDataAndFallsBackToDefaults(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');
        $order->setEmail('customer@example.com');
        $order->setDatacustom(['firstname' => 'Jane', 'lastname' => 'Doe']);

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(2);

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildCreateBookingPayload($order, $subContingentData, $externalBooking);

        $this->assertTrue($payload['isItPreBooking']);
        $this->assertSame('Jane Doe', $payload['customerName']);
        $this->assertSame('customer@example.com', $payload['customerEmail']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('customerPhoneNumber', $payload);

        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('pricePaid', $payload['bookingDetail']);
        $this->assertArrayHasKey('orderDate', $payload['bookingDetail']);
    }

    public function testBuildConfirmBookingPayloadEmitsBookingDetail(): void
    {
        $order = new Order();
        $order->setLocale('fr');

        $product = new Product();
        $product->setName('Ski Pass 1 day');
        $product->setCode('SKI-1D');

        $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        $subContingent->setExternalId('slot-1');

        $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();
        $externalBooking->setExternalId('booking-1');
        $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);

        $subContingentData = new SubContingentData();
        $subContingentData->setProduct($product);
        $subContingentData->setQty(1);

        $payload = $this->apiHelper->buildConfirmBookingPayload($order, $externalBooking, $subContingentData);

        $this->assertArrayHasKey('bookingDetail', $payload);
        $this->assertSame('Ski Pass 1 day', $payload['bookingDetail']['productName']);
        $this->assertSame('SKI-1D', $payload['bookingDetail']['productId']);
        $this->assertSame('EUR', $payload['bookingDetail']['currency']);
        $this->assertSame('ESHOP', $payload['bookingDetail']['origin']);
    }

    public function testGetAvailabilityDateRangeReadsCurrentSeason(): void
    {
        $season = new Season();
        $season
            ->setStartDate(new \DateTime('2026-04-01'))
            ->setEndDate(new \DateTime('2026-10-31'));

        $seasonRepo = $this->createMock(SeasonRepository::class);
        $seasonRepo->method('getCurrentSeason')->willReturn($season);

        $this->em
            ->method('getRepository')
            ->with(Season::class)
            ->willReturn($seasonRepo);

        $range = $this->apiHelper->getAvailabilityDateRange();

        $this->assertSame('2026-04-01', $range['from']);
        $this->assertSame('2026-10-31', $range['to']);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBookingV2\Rest;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository\BookingV2Repository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Exception\ExternalActivityException;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ExternalActivityHandlerInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\OrderitemInterface;
use Psr\SimpleCache\CacheInterface;

/**
 * Implements the ExternalActivityHandlerInterface against the Eliberty Booking V2 REST API.
 * All I/O goes through BookingV2Repository; mapping and payload assembly is delegated to ApiHelper.
 */
class ElibertyBookingV2Handler implements ExternalActivityHandlerInterface
{
    private BookingV2Repository $repository;

    private ApiHelper $apiHelper;

    private CacheInterface $redisCache;

    private EntityManagerInterface $em;

    public function __construct(
        BookingV2Repository $repository,
        ApiHelper $apiHelper,
        CacheInterface $redisCache,
        EntityManagerInterface $em
    ) {
        $this->repository = $repository;
        $this->apiHelper  = $apiHelper;
        $this->redisCache = $redisCache;
        $this->em         = $em;
    }

    /**
     * @throws ExternalActivityException
     */
    public function getDaysAvailability(Product $product): array
    {
        try {
            $resourceUuid = (string) $product->getExternalActivityResourceId();
            $range        = $this->apiHelper->getAvailabilityDateRange();
            $cacheKey     = $this->apiHelper->getRedisKey('booking_v2_days', $resourceUuid, $range);

            $cached = $this->redisCache->get($cacheKey);
            if (null !== $cached && false !== $cached) {
                return $cached;

    /**

    public function getSubContingentsBetweenDates(Product $product, \DateTime $startDate, ?\DateTime $endDate): array
    {

    }

    public function findBooking(string $externalBookingId, WebInstance $webInstance, ?OrderitemInterface $item = null): ?ExternalBooking
    {
        return $this->em->getRepository(ExternalBooking::class)->findOneBy([
            'externalId'  => $externalBookingId,

    }

    /**

     * @param array<string, mixed> $response
     *
     * @return array<int, array<string, mixed>>
     */
    private function extractTimeslots(array $response): array
    {
        if (isset($response['items']) && \is_array($response['items'])) {
            return $response['items'];
        }
        if (array_keys($response) === range(0, \count($response) - 1)) {
            return $response;
        }

        return [];
    }

    private function findSubContingentByExternalId(string $externalId, ?WebInstance $webinstance): ?SubContingent
    {
        if ('' === $externalId) {
            return null;
        }

        /** @var SubContingent|null $found */
        $found = $this->em->getRepository(SubContingent::class)->findOneBy([
            'externalId'  => $externalId,
            'webinstance' => $webinstance,
        ]);

        return $found;
    }

    private function toException(\Throwable $e): \Exception
    {
        return $e instanceof \Exception ? $e : new \Exception($e->getMessage(), (int) $e->getCode());
    }
}

file.content:
- '@session'

    external_voucher.api.client.jwt.authenticated:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\AuthJwtApiClient
        factory: ['@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ParameterizedClientFactory', 'createAuthJwtApiClient']
        arguments:
            $tokenError: '@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Error\Token\ApiPlatformTokenError'
            $apiParams:
                base_uri: '%env(external_voucher_api_base_url)%'
                login_uri: /auth
            $apiConfigParams:
                credentials: [payment.external_voucher.incert_api_credentials]

    fpn_tag.tag_manager:
        alias: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Manager\TagManager
        public: true

    ingenie.api.client.jwt.authenticated:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\AuthJwtApiClient
        factory: ['@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ParameterizedClientFactory', 'createAuthJwtApiClient']
        arguments:
            $tokenError: '@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Error\Token\ApiIngenieTokenError'
            $apiParams:
                login_uri: 'https://api.ingenie.fr/login'
            $apiConfigParams:
                main_uri: [ingenie.api_connect, client_url]
                credentials: [ingenie.api_connect, login_options]

    login.success.handler:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Security\Http\Authentication\LoginSuccessHandler
        arguments: ['@security.http_utils', {}, '@router']

    object_normalizer:
        class: Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\ObjectNormalizer
        public: false

        tags: [serializer.normalizer]

    pix_sortable_behavior.position.orm:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Handler\PositionORMHandler
        public: false
        arguments:
            - '@doctrine.orm.entity_manager'
        calls:
            - ['setPositionField', ['%pix.sortable.behavior.position.field%']]
            - ['setSortableGroups', ['%pix.sortable.behavior.sortable_groups%']]

    redpill.access.token.manager:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\OAuth2\Entity\AccessTokenManager
        arguments: ['@doctrine.orm.entity_manager', '%fos_oauth_server.model.access_token.class%']

    redpill.oauth_server.storage.default:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\OAuth2\Storage\OAuthStorage
        arguments:
            - '@fos_oauth_server.client_manager'
            - '@fos_oauth_server.access_token_manager'
            - '@redpill.refresh_token_manager.default'
            - '@fos_oauth_server.auth_code_manager'
            - '@redpill.oauth_server.user_provider'
            - '@security.encoder_factory'

input.new_string:
# --- Eliberty Booking V2 ---------------------------------------------------
    # Underlying JWT-authenticated client: logs in on the super-admin backend
    # and talks to the booking module for every other call. Both hosts accept
    # the same Bearer token issued by /login.
    eliberty_booking_v2.api.client.jwt.authenticated:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\AuthJwtApiClient
        factory: ['@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ParameterizedClientFactory', 'createAuthJwtApiClient']
        arguments:
            $tokenError: '@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Error\Token\StatusCodeTokenError'
            $apiParams:
                login_data_key: json
                response_token_key: access_token
                cache_keys_excluded: ['password']
            $apiConfigParams:
                base_uri:    [booking.v2.api_base_url]
                main_uri:    [booking.v2.api_base_url]
                login_uri:   [booking.v2.login_url]
                credentials: [booking.v2.credentials]

    # Decorator that injects the x-tenant-slag header (read per-tenant from ConfigManager)
    # on every call before delegating to the authenticated client.
    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client\ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient:
        arguments:
            $authClient: '@eliberty_booking_v2.api.client.jwt.authenticated'
            $configManager: '@Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager'

    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository\BookingV2Repository:
        arguments:
            $bookingV2ApiClient: '@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client\ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient'
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

    login.success.handler:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Security\Http\Authentication\LoginSuccessHandler
        arguments: ['@security.http_utils', {}, '@router']

# --- Eliberty Booking V2 ---------------------------------------------------
    # Underlying JWT-authenticated client: logs in on the super-admin backend
    # and talks to the booking module for every other call. Both hosts accept
    # the same Bearer token issued by /login.
    eliberty_booking_v2.api.client.jwt.authenticated:
        class: Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\AuthJwtApiClient

        arguments:
            $tokenError: '@Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Error\Token\StatusCodeTokenError'
            $apiParams:
                login_data_key: json
                response_token_key: access_token
                cache_keys_excluded: ['password']
            $apiConfigParams:
                base_uri:    [booking.v2.api_base_url]
                main_uri:    [booking.v2.api_base_url]
                login_uri:   [booking.v2.login_url]
                credentials: [booking.v2.credentials]

    # Decorator that injects the x-tenant-slag header (read per-tenant from ConfigManager)

    ## Auto-tagging
    ## Auto-tagging

    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Controller\:
        resource: '../../Controller'
        exclude: '../../Controller/{ControllerResolver.php,JsRouting/Controller.php,Console/SonataHelperController.php}'
        tags: [controller.service_arguments]
        calls:
            - [setContainer, ['@service_container']] # Needed because extends controller which use "container"

    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\:
        public: false
        resource: '../../{AccessControl,Admin/DatagridFilter,Admin/ListAction,Admin/ListField,Api/Formatter,ApiClient,Asset,Authenticate,BarCode,Booking,CatalogImport,Config,ControllerWizard,Dashboard,Debugger,Delivery,DependencyInjection,DetectionStrategy,Doctrine,DocumentProcessing,DynamicPrice,ENJPass,Export,ExternalActivity,ExternalService,Form/Promotion,Form/Proposal,Form/Type/HomeDeliveryType.php,Form/Type/PickupDeliveryType.php,Format,Generator,Helper,Import,Keycard,Listener/Tracking,Mail,Manager,Mercure,MessageHandler,MessageMiddleware,MessageTracking,OpenSystem,Order,OrderProcessing,PDSFidelity,PDSMultipass,Permission,Printing,Processor/Order,Promotion,Proposal,Proxy,Puppeteer,Resolver,Role,Security/Voter,Sms,Specification,Statistics,Storage,SwissPass,Taxes,Template,Trinity,Twig,Validities,Voucher,Wallet}'
        exclude: '../../Trinity/Rest'

    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\MessageHandler\Telepass\Event\:
        resource: '../../MessageHandler/Telepass/Event'
        autoconfigure: false
        tags: [{ name: messenger.message_handler, bus: event.bus }]

    Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Pricing\:
        public: false
        resource: '../../Pricing'
        exclude: '../../Pricing/Provider'

content.text: Now let me verify the ExternalActivityHandlerFactory resolution for this new provider name.

file.content:
<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity;

class ExternalActivityHandlerFactory
{
    protected array $mapping = [];

    public function add(ExternalActivityHandlerInterface $processor, $serviceId)
    {
        $this->mapping[$serviceId] = $processor;
    }

    private function getServiceId($str, array $noStrip = []): string
    {
        $str = strtolower($str);
        // non-alpha and non-numeric characters become spaces
        $str = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9'.implode('', $noStrip).']+/i', ' ', $str);
        $str = trim($str);
        // uppercase the first character of each word
        $str = ucwords($str);
        $str = str_replace(' ', '', $str);

        return sprintf('Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\%s\Rest\%sHandler', $str, $str);
    }

    public function getHandler(string $name): ExternalActivityHandlerInterface
    {
        $serviceId = $this->getServiceId($name);

        if (!\array_key_exists($serviceId, $this->mapping)) {
            throw new \UnexpectedValueException(sprintf('ExternalActivity handler not found for %s', $serviceId));
        }

        return $this->mapping[$serviceId];
    }
}

<?php

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\AxBooking\Rest\AxBookingHandler;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBooking\Rest\ElibertyBookingHandler;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ExternalActivityHandlerFactory;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Koralp\Rest\KoralpHandler;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\TeamaxessReservation\Rest\TeamaxessReservationHandler;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

class ExternalActivityHandlerFactoryTest extends TestCase
{
    protected ExternalActivityHandlerFactory $externalActivityHandlerFactory;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory = new ExternalActivityHandlerFactory();

        $axBookingHandler            = $this->createMock(AxBookingHandler::class);
        $elibertyBookingHandler      = $this->createMock(ElibertyBookingHandler::class);
        $koralpHandler               = $this->createMock(KoralpHandler::class);
        $teamaxessReservationHandler = $this->createMock(TeamaxessReservationHandler::class);

        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->add($axBookingHandler, AxBookingHandler::class);
        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->add($elibertyBookingHandler, ElibertyBookingHandler::class);
        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->add($koralpHandler, KoralpHandler::class);
        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->add($teamaxessReservationHandler, TeamaxessReservationHandler::class);
    }

    /**
     * @dataProvider bookingHandlerProvider
     */
    public function testItShouldBeReturnABookingHandler(string $classExpected, string $externalActivityHandlerCode): void
    {
        $handler = $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->getHandler($externalActivityHandlerCode);

        $this->assertInstanceOf($classExpected, $handler);
    }

    public function bookingHandlerProvider(): \Generator
    {
        yield 'AxBooking' => [AxBookingHandler::class, ExternalBookingProvider::AX_BOOKING];
        yield 'Eliberty Booking' => [ElibertyBookingHandler::class, ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING];
        yield 'Koralp' => [KoralpHandler::class, ExternalBookingProvider::KORALP];
        yield 'TeamAxess Reservation' => [TeamaxessReservationHandler::class, ExternalBookingProvider::TEAMAXESS_RESERVATION];
    }

    public function testItShouldReturnAnUnexpectedValueException(): void
    {
        $this->expectException(\UnexpectedValueException::class);
        $this->externalActivityHandlerFactory->getHandler('uuid');
    }
}

    /**

content.text:
Implementation complete. Summary of what landed on `feat/newbooking-implementation`:

**Production code**
- `src/RedpillBundle/Enum/ExternalBookingProvider.php` — added `ELIBERTY_BOOKING_V2`
- `src/RedpillBundle/ApiClient/ElibertyBookingV2/Client/ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient.php` — decorator injecting `x-tenant-slag` from ConfigManager
- `src/RedpillBundle/ApiClient/ElibertyBookingV2/Repository/BookingV2Repository.php` — one method per remote endpoint (`listTimeslots`, `createBooking`, `extendPrebook`, `confirmPrebook`)
- `src/RedpillBundle/ExternalActivity/ElibertyBookingV2/Rest/ApiHelper.php` — pure payload builder + hydrator extending `BaseApiHelper`
- `src/RedpillBundle/ExternalActivity/ElibertyBookingV2/Rest/ElibertyBookingV2Handler.php` — implements `ExternalActivityHandlerInterface`; synchronizeBooking is extend-only
- `src/RedpillBundle/Resources/config/services.yml` — wires `eliberty_booking_v2.api.client.jwt.authenticated` via `ParameterizedClientFactory`, the decorator and the repository

**Tests (TDD, all GREEN)**
- `ElibertyBookingV2ApiClientTest` (3)
- `BookingV2RepositoryTest` (4)
- `ApiHelperTest` (8)
- `ElibertyBookingV2HandlerTest` (9)
- `ExternalActivityHandlerFactoryTest` extended (+1 case)

**Quality gates**
- 30/30 unit tests pass (80 assertions)
- PHPStan level 1: no errors
- PHP CS Fixer: clean

Remaining manual steps before rollout (covered in the plan's smoke-test section): set `booking.v2.tenant-slag`, `booking.v2.api_base_url`, `booking.v2.login_url`, `booking.v2.credentials`, and `booking.v2.cache_expiration_time` in ConfigManager for a dev tenant, then exercise the funnel end-to-end.
